scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && (test -d venv || python3 -m venv venv) && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
